howItWorks.intro: This conveyor belt speed calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Belt Speed
rules.formula: Speed = π × Roller Dia × (Motor RPM / Gear Ratio)
rules.explanation: Output RPM times roller circumference gives linear belt speed.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: Belt speed = roller circumference × output RPM after gear reduction.

faq.q: What is a typical conveyor speed?
faq.a: Most material handling conveyors run 50-200 ft/min.
